glm_adjacent_result_template.top_line: REVIEW-ONLY: independently discoverable, independently reviewable, no authority inheritance detected.

rules: Do not report a bare PASS as the final GLM-adjacent outcome.
Report REVIEW_ONLY first when artifacts are comparable but no conformance, interoperability, adoption, delegation, or execution authority claim is made.
Use PASS only for specific boundary checks.
Use FAIL when authority inheritance, delegation, implied interoperability, or external validity dependency is detected.
Use INCOMPLETE when claims, non-claims, or authority scope are missing.
